jobs.title: Social Media Executive
jobs.description: Handle content scheduling, campaign support, creative coordination, and social media reporting across major platforms.

jobs.title: Social Media Manager
jobs.description: Lead social media strategy, manage campaigns, oversee team execution, and drive brand growth across platforms.

jobs.title: Performance Marketer
jobs.description: Run and optimize paid campaigns across Meta and Google while improving lead quality and ROAS.

jobs.title: Content Writer
jobs.description: Create SEO-friendly blogs, website content, and marketing copies aligned with brand tone.

jobs.title: Content Creator
jobs.description: Develop engaging video and visual content for social media and marketing campaigns.

jobs.title: Video Editor
jobs.description: Edit reels, ads, and branded content with strong storytelling and visual consistency.

jobs.title: Motion Graphic Designer
jobs.description: Create engaging motion graphics and animations for ads, videos, and brand storytelling.

jobs.title: Graphic Designer
jobs.description: Design creatives for social media, branding, and digital marketing campaigns.

jobs.title: Creative Head
jobs.description: Lead creative direction, oversee design teams, and ensure brand consistency across all campaigns.

jobs.title: Backend Developer
jobs.description: Build and maintain server-side logic, APIs, and database architecture.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.description: Develop responsive UI using React, Next.js, and modern frontend tools.

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
jobs.description: Design user-centric interfaces and improve user journeys for digital products.

jobs.title: SEO Analyst
jobs.description: Handle technical SEO, audits, keyword strategy, and performance tracking.

jobs.title: SEO Executive
jobs.description: Execute on-page and off-page SEO tasks, keyword tracking, and reporting.

jobs.title: Business Development Executive
jobs.description: Generate leads, manage outreach, and support client acquisition strategies.
